charmanApiUrl.name: Charman API URL
charmanApiUrl.hint: The base URL for your Charman character management API (e.g., https://charman.example.com). Leave empty to disable Charman integration.

charmanApiPath.name: Charman API Path
charmanApiPath.hint: The API path prefix for your Charman API endpoints (e.g., /charman/api/foundry or /myextension/api/foundry). Default is /charman/api/foundry.

charmanApiKey.name: Charman API Key
charmanApiKey.hint: Optional API key for authenticating with your Charman API. Leave empty if your API doesn't require authentication.

mpEnabled.name: Enable Mental Points (MP) System
mpEnabled.hint: Enable the houserule Mental Points system. When enabled, characters gain MP equal to their RIP (Reasoning + Intuition + Psyche) attributes. Powers can then have MP costs.

armorEnabled.name: Enable Armor / Equipment System
armorEnabled.hint: Enable the houserule Armor system. When enabled, an Armor tab appears on each character sheet where armor of a given rank can be equipped. Equipped armor reduces incoming physical damage.

degradingArmor.name: Enable Degrading Armor
degradingArmor.hint: When enabled (requires Armor system), armor takes damage when it soaks incoming damage. Armor rating is reduced by the amount soaked. Example: Incredible (40) armor that soaks 30 damage becomes 10 rating. Armor can be repaired from the Armor tab.

lockPlayerStats.name: Lock Player Stat Editing
lockPlayerStats.hint: When enabled, prevents players from editing character form attributes (Fighting, Agility, Strength, etc.) on their sheets. Only GMs can edit stats, but players can still sync from Charman and edit equipment/armor.

healthCalculationMethod.name: Health Calculation Method
healthCalculationMethod.hint: Choose how character health is calculated: FASE Sum (F+A+S+E, default) or Endurance × 2 (classic rule). Changing this will recalculate health for all characters.
